message.content:
The world record for the oldest cat ever is held by Creme Puff, a mixed tabby cat from Austin, Texas, who lived to 38 years and 3 days (born August 3, 1967; died August 6, 2005).⁠Guinnessworldrecords

This is verified by Guinness World Records and remains the longest confirmed feline lifespan. She was owned by Jake Perry, who also owned the previous record holder, Grandpa Rexs Allen (34 years and 59 days).⁠Wikipedia

For context:

Oldest living cat (as of late 2025/early 2026 data): Flossie, a UK tortoiseshell born December 29, 1995, who reached 30 years old—impressive but still well short of Creme Puff's record.⁠Wikipedia

No verified cat has surpassed Creme Puff's age. Claims beyond this are typically unverified or anecdotal.
